title: aster scrobiculatus
intro: Aster scrobiculatus is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as the rough-leaved aster, that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aster scrobiculatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Aster scrobiculatus can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
